Discord Link Status Not Linked

You haven't linked your Discord account yet.

  • Access to high quality voice channels
  • Interact with community members across multiple channels
  • Get announcements for events, updates, and more
  • Participate in community-led events and game nights
Link Discord Log in to link
Why link?
Linking your Discord account automatically allows us to sync all your roles to Discord! Whether it be store ranks or other forum groups, we have you covered.

Server Rank Store
SANDBOX MODE
The rank store environment is set to SANDBOX. Use sandbox credentials.

Server Ranks Store

Purchase ranks to unlock exclusive benefits and support our servers and community as we're hard at work delivering the best experiences possible!

TTT Premium Perks TTT Pointshop Discounts Community Support
Purchase Summary
📦
No rank selected
$0.00
Recipient
{$xf.visitor.username}
Gift to Player Clear Gift User

Select a rank to continue

Important Notice
All transactions are final due to the instant delivery of our store ranks. Due to this, there is a no-refund policy unless there are cases of fraud or transactions without your knowledge or consent.

{$upgrade.title|raw}

${$upgrade.price} per {$upgrade.length_unit}
{$upgrade.description|raw}

Rank Store

Store Closed

We apologize but the store is currently closed for scheduled maintenance. Please check back later when the store is open.

<xf:title>Gift Selection</xf:title>

<xf:form action="/store/userselectsearch" id="userSearch">
    <xf:textboxrow name="username" ac="single" label="{{ phrase('user_name') }}" />
    <xf:hiddenval name="rank_id" value="{$xf.request.filter('rank_id', 'uint')}" />

    <xf:submitrow submit="Select user" icon="gift" class="js-overlayClose" />
</xf:form>

<xf:js>
    var userSearchForm = document.getElementById('userSearch');

    if (userSearchForm) {
        userSearchForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            e.preventDefault();

            var formData = new FormData(userSearchForm);

            // Convert FormData to object for XF.ajax
            var formObject = {};
            formData.forEach(function(value, key) {
                formObject[key] = value;
            });

            XF.ajax('POST', userSearchForm.action, formObject, function(data) {
                if (data && data.user_id && data.user_name) {
                    if (window.StoreApp) {
                        window.StoreApp.recipientRankData = {
                            userId: data.user_id,
                            userName: data.user_name,
                            highestRankPriority: data.highest_rank_priority || 0,
                            currentRankPrice: data.current_rank_price || 0
                        };
                    }
                    setStoreUser(data.user_id, data.user_name);
                } else {
                    console.error('Invalid response data', data);
                }
            }, {
                error: function(error) {
                    console.error('AJAX error', error);
                    XF.alert(error.message || 'An error occurred while processing your request.');
                }
            });
        });
    }
</xf:js>

Process Order .paymentHeaderSuccess { font-size: 2em; display: inline-block; } .paymentHeaderTextSuccess { font-size: 2em; display: inline-block; color: limegreen; padding: 0px 5px 0px 5px; } .paymentHeaderFail { font-size: 2em; display: inline-block; } .paymentHeaderTextFail { font-size: 2em; display: inline-block; color: #c94e4e; }
❌

Uh oh. There was a payment error!

❌

Unfortunately there was a problem prcessing your payment with OrderID {$orderId}. Contact an Owner or Lead Administrator to further investigate this issue as we don't want you to not receive your store rank.


We apologize for the difficulties.

🎉

Success

🎉

Your payment with OrderID {$transactionId} was successfully processed! The giftee You should receive the rank soon, though rarely this may take a couple of hours. Contact an Owner or Lead Administrator if the giftee does you do not receive the rank within 24 hours.


Thank you for your purchase! We hope you enjoy your new rank privileges!
